unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We're here at Mount Huangshan!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：mount- 本意即为“山，上升”，同源词如 mountain。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The clouds look amazing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆法：客老（klaʊ）的，天上云彩客老的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It feels like a magical place.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：触及 (feel) 到某种像 (like) 的质感。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It feels like a magical place.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀法：magic (魔法) + -al (形容词后缀)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The trees and rocks look like a part of a painting.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：摇滚乐 (rock) 就像岩石 (rock) 一样坚硬有力。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We're at a rest area now.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：测试 (test) 完需要休息 (rest)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We're at a rest area now.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：挨 (eə) 惹 (rɪə)，在这个区域容易惹事。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We're at a rest area now.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词记忆：rest (休息) + area (区域)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Climbing is hard, but we're making good progress.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组搭配：progress 前面常搭配 make，意为制造了进步。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Although the weather is bad, many people here are still in high spirits.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根拼接：al (全部) + though (尽管) = 虽然。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: many people here are still in high spirits.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：死盯 (stɪl)，他仍然死盯着。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: many people here are still in high spirits.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 图像记忆：精神 (spirits) 像气球一样飞得很高 (high)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 经历；经验 v. 经历
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I don't think my brother Peter is enjoying the experience very much
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：ex- (出) + peri (尝试) + -ence (名词后缀) -> 尝试出来的就是经验。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The sun is shining through the clouds!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：穿过 (through) 树林时要小心。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm so glad we're here at Bright Peak.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：听到 good news，心情很 glad。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm so glad we're here at Bright Peak.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：在山顶 (peak) 大声说话 (speak)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Everything looks grey
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拼写记忆：英式拼写用 e，美式用 a (gray)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: you can't see much because of the heavy fog.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组区别：because of 后接名词，because 后接句子。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: you can't see much because of the heavy fog.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：青蛙 (frog) 在雾 (fog) 中迷路了。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The ground is very wet
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：操场是圆的 (round) 建立在地面 (ground) 上。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The ground is very wet
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：渔网 (net) 捞上来总是湿的 (wet)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 令人疲倦的；累人的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Climbing is tiring!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：tire (使疲劳) + -ing (令人...的)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: they don't seem tired at all.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：看 (see) 起来似乎 (seem) 是他。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Mount Huangshan is beautiful in the sunlight.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词：sun (太阳) + light (光)。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: at the top vs. at the bottom
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: it feels good to be at the top!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 图像记忆：想象站在金字塔最上方的点 (top)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Helen Thought
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 同源法：think (思考) 的过去式变形直接用作名词。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The mountain feels like a magical place.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：mount- (山) + -ain (名词后缀)。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: at the start vs. in the beginning
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: who enjoys the experience more at the start?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：比赛站在起跑线 (start) 时。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: how does Peter feel at the end?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：发送 (send) 消息结束 (end) 聊天。

unit_vocabulary.comparison: at the end vs. in the end
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: how does Peter feel at the end?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词组对比：at the end 强调具体位置或时间的末点。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: There is a huge storm today.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：石头 (sto) 满 (m) 天飞，这就是风暴。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The rain is pouring down.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 谐音记忆：泼 (pour) 水。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The wind is blowing hard too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：风 (wind) 从窗户 (window) 吹进来。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He is shouting and running after his hat!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：向外 (out) 大喊 (shout)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He is shouting and running after his hat!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作联想：跑到某人后面 (after) 就是在追逐他。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 不论是雨或是晴；不管发生什么事
unit_vocabulary.comparison: rain or shine vs. day and night
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Enjoy your day, come rain or shine.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 字面翻译：下雨 (rain) 还是天晴 (shine)，也就是风雨无阻。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How does the weather affect us?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 前缀记忆：af- (表强调) + fect (做) -> 施加作用去影响。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the north, it's warm and dry.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：尝试 (try) 保持干燥 (dry)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Oh! And now there's lightning!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根记忆：light (光) + ning -> 像光一样闪过的现象。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 有暴风雨 (或暴风雪)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the north, it's stormy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：storm (风暴) + -y (形容词后缀)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the north, it's stormy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 方向联想：N 是指北针的标记 (North)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the west, it's sunny and hot.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 方向联想：西部的 (west) 风景最好 (best)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the south and east, it's stormy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 方向联想：嘴巴 (mouth) 朝南 (south)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: In the south and east, it's stormy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拼写规律：方向词 E 字母开头就是 East。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Don't worry. I'm staying in!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 动作联想：留在 (stay) 里面 (in)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 运气好的；带来好运的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Wow, lucky you!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：luck (运气) + -y (形容词后缀)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Wow, lucky you!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 口语短句直译法。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm sunbathing at the moment!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词：sun (太阳) + bathe (沐浴)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hey, come and visit us some day!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译记忆：在未来的某 (some) 一天 (day)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The temperature is around 20°C.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根联系：temper(脾气)随着温度(temperature)的升高而变大。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: now we're building a snowman outside.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 合成词：snow (雪) + man (人)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's raining heavily.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：heavy (重的) 变 y 为 i + -ly 副词后缀。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's cold and snowy.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀记忆：snow (雪) + -y (有...特性的)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He's playing beach volleyball right now.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词记忆：beach (沙滩) 上的 volleyball (排球)。

unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: They fly so high.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拼写规律：-igh 发 /aɪ/ 的长音。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It is freezing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词缀拓展：freeze (结冰) 去 e 加 -ing。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some of the tourists are from South China.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 后缀规律：tour (旅游) + -ist (表示人)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hey, Anna. How's your holiday going?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 常见英文女名联想。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My brother John's here too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 常见英文男名联想。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How's the weather in Stockholm?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 地理专有名词直接记忆。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We're here at Mount Huangshan!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: Mount (山) + 拼音 Huangshan。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm so glad we're here at Bright Peak.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 意译专有名词：Bright (光明的) + Peak (顶)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: （附加词汇）身体不适；有点不舒服
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: if we are feeling ill, we say we are "under the weather".
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 画面联想：被天气 (weather) 压在下面 (under)，引申为身体抱恙。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: If we are feeling stressed and busy, we can say that we are "snowed under".
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 画面联想：被厚厚的雪 (snow) 埋没 (under) 了，比喻工作多得做不完。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: （附加词汇）变得明亮；高兴起来
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: to brighten up : to become happier
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 直译引申：天气转晴变亮，人的心情也开朗起来。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: （附加词汇）极度快乐；高兴得飘飘然
unit_vocabulary.comparison: on cloud nine vs. very happy
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: to be on cloud nine : to be extremely happy and excited
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 俗语联想：高兴得仿佛飞到了九重天上的云朵 (cloud nine) 里。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: （附加词汇）非常健康；安然无恙
unit_vocabulary.comparison: as right as rain vs. healthy
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: to feel as right as rain : to feel healthy or well again
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 押头韵修辞 (right/rain)：久旱逢甘霖般妥帖、健康。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: （附加词汇）困惑不解；迷迷糊糊
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: to be in a fog : to be confused
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 画面联想：如同置身于大雾 (fog) 之中，看不清方向。
